key_finding: SaveRoot-precedent claim in checkpoint.go's doc comment and commit message is false (SaveRoot uses in-place WriteAt+Sync, not temp-file+rename); non-blocking documentation defect, actual Checkpoint implementation is correct and atomic.
next_subtask_note: 1.3.4 (recovery replay) can rely on the (SegmentNumber, OffsetInSegment) checkpoint pointer format as-is; it is verified consistent with Writer.Append's actual per-segment offset semantics.
